title: 127 ABY
content:

{{Year

|emperor=[[Roan Fel]] {{C|[[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] of the [[Fel Empire]]}}<ref name="L0½" />
|events=*The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] discover that the [[Ossus Project]] has been sabotaged<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>
*Start of the [[Sith–Imperial War]]<ref name="L0½" />
*End of the Cold War between the [[Fel Empire]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].
*The [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal syndicate was resurrected.<ref name="Legacy 16">[[Legacy (2006) 16|''Legacy'' (2006) 16]]</ref>}}
The following events took place in '''127 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] were confirmed to not be extinct by the [[New Jedi Order]], as they were believed to be for decades; however, they could not prove that they were behind the sabotage of the [[Ossus Project]].<ref name="L0½" />
*The [[Hidden Temple (Sith–Imperial War)|Hidden Temple]] was constructed by the New Jedi Order on [[Taivas]].<ref name="Legacy 24">[[Legacy (2006) 24|''Legacy'' (2006) 24]]</ref>
*Start of the [[Sith–Imperial War]].<ref name="L0½" />
*End of the Cold War between the [[Fel Empire]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].<ref name="L0½" />
*Resurrection of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]].<ref name="Legacy 16" />
*The [[Pellaeon-class Star Destroyer|''Pellaeon''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Iron Sun]]'' was attacked by [[Celeste Morne]], the entire crew transformed into [[rakghoul]]s. Morne took the vessel into the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].<ref name="SWL28">[[Legacy (2006) 28|''Legacy'' (2006) 28]]</ref>
*[[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Chernan Ordo]] was killed in the [[Battle of Botajef]], the title was taken by [[Yaga Auchs]] who removed the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] from the Sith–Imperial War.<ref name="Legacy 41">[[Legacy (2006) 41|''Legacy'' (2006) 41]]</ref>

==Battles==
*Battle of Botajef<ref name="Legacy 41" />

==Deaths==
